## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type

- [ ] New documentation
- [ ] Fix existing documentation
- [ ] Navigation or site structure
- [ ] SEO, metadata, or agent indexing
- [ ] Workflow or repo hygiene

## Checks

- [ ] I ran `uv run zensical build --clean`
- [ ] I verified links or commands I changed
- [ ] I did not include real secrets, tokens, customer data, or private hostnames
- [ ] I updated `docs/llms.txt` if I added or moved important pages
- [ ] I updated `zensical.toml` navigation if needed

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for visible layout or navigation changes.

## Notes

Add any follow-up work or known limitations.
